key_items: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see record 10-day outflow streak totaling nearly $3 billion
Bitcoin is at 'pivotal level' as $65K downside risk looms
The Fed's rate lever is breaking as bond markets stop following its lead
reasoning: Institutional outflows from spot Bitcoin ETFs combined with technical breakdown signals and macro uncertainty around Fed policy create near-term downside pressure. Regulatory progress (CLARITY Act, CFTC perp approval) provides some long-term support but insufficient to offset current momentum deterioration and $65K support test risk.
risks: Record ETF outflows coupled with $65K support level breach could trigger capitulation selling and liquidations that accelerate downside toward $60K-62K range within 1-7 days.
